chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal 167 of 2018 High Court Appeal 174 of 2018 High Court Appeal 175 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection / reply at ‘A’. 2. For orders on CMA No.1496/2018. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.1497/2018. 02.02.2026 These appeals are pending since 2018 without any progress. The appellants are unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the appellants are not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the high court appeals are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
